name: docpull
description: PDF to Markdown extraction API for AI agents

skills.name: Extract PDF to Markdown
skills.description: Converts a publicly accessible PDF URL to clean structured Markdown. Detects headings, lists, and document structure.
examples: Convert this PDF to markdown: https://example.com/contract.pdf

skills.name: Probe PDF cost
skills.description: Check the page count and extraction cost for a PDF before paying.
